title: Autonomy promotion/demotion lifecycle (streaks; manual default; instant demotion) + park the tier-classifier fitting

tests.summary: autonomy lifecycle proven — 5 consecutive accepts emit a promotion suggestion; approving (applyPromotion) sets the rule auto (autonomy-promotion-ok); a rule can be set auto directly with NO streak (human toggle); rejecting an auto-applied change demotes to manual INSTANTLY (autonomy-demotion-ok); any reject resets the accept streak. Default autonomy is `manual`. Part of the 11-test improver suite; full suite 612 passed / 0 failed.

classifierParked.summary: classifier-parked-ok — tier-classifier marked PARKED (x-garrison.parked: true + a [PARKED 2026-06-14] description noting the Model Router supersedes it). It is structurally UNSELECTABLE: its faculty `classifier` is not one of the 6 roles, so the resolver rejects it. Not referenced by the active `default` composition. Residual references (dogfood-orch dev composition, mcp-gateway for_consumers text, data/ratings.json telemetry) logged as non-active.

e2e.summary: N/A — autonomy state machine + manifest park; committed unit tests are the gate.

blockers: The autonomy lifecycle's LIVE round-trip (seed a 5-accept streak through the review UI, approve the promotion, then reject an auto-applied change) shares the deferred review-queue UI from MR5a — the STATE MACHINE that governs it (recordOutcome/applyPromotion/setAutonomy, gates enforced at auto) is fully committed + unit-tested here. Logged.
notes: Autonomy: set directly or earned. A rule's autonomy can be set `auto` immediately (manual toggle, no streak) — for seeding obviously-safe rules. Separately, the Improver SUGGESTS promotion: per-(rule,kind) streaks of 5 consecutive accepts (zero rejects; any reject resets) emit a promotion proposal that applies on Approve like any proposal. Demotion is automatic + INSTANT: rejecting/reverting anything an auto rule applied drops it to manual with a notice. The Improver never raises its OWN autonomy without a human action (the toggle or approving a promotion). tier-classifier parked (superseded wholesale by the router). Satisfies brief §3 tokens autonomy-promotion-ok, autonomy-demotion-ok, classifier-parked-ok.
